News

My thoughts on the Iran conflict and the cost of fuel

Friday, 17 April, 2026
It is undoubtedly the case that the Iranian regime has long posed a threat to the UK and its allies. Iran has sponsored international terrorism and conducted assassination plots on British soil, as well as brutally repressed and killed its own citizens. Iran’s nuclear programme, ballistic missiles and repeated cyber attacks are of significant concern, and the consequences of the war that has now...
